reply.text: My therapist is going to ask why a hammock has me this stressed

messages.text: about that soft, you really chose sunlight and hammock just to raise
stressed over a net and some toes is wild
the toes are fine, the sunlight snitching through the hammock is evil
sounds like a you problem tbh
yeah my therapist agrees, said stop following women with cozy lives
you are loud, make it count
i like confusing pretty, suffering is just the side quest
i've been watching your stuff for a while
i was testing you this whole time
you really forgot im your ex huh
i can back it up in person
